title: clypeola macrocarpa
intro: Clypeola macrocarpa, also known as large-seeded cress or large-seeded blister cress, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support respiratory health. Clypeola macrocarpa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
